text:
Search your Clipboard history in Spotlight on
Mac
You can use Spotlight to search your Clipboard history.
1. On your Mac, press Command-Space bar to open Spotlight.
2. Click ® to the right of the search field, or Press Command-4.
Note: When you first search your Clipboard, you may be asked to click Enable in Spotlight. Sensitive
information may appear on the Clipboard.
3. Do any of the following:
• Search your Clipboard history: Enter what you're looking for in the search field.
• Copy from your Clipboard: Click O to the right of the item, or select the item and press Command-
C.
To paste the item, click where you want it to appear, then press Command-V.
• Erase your Clipboard history: Click © to the right of the search field, then choose Clear History.
